creator: CdK1@bsd.cl
text:
Dear maintainer:

                	
                Checking user groups, and checking your link, I've noticed that among the five BUG (user groups) of South America only three are available, but said that BSD Chile (http://www.bsd.cl) not found in that list. In short and to the mind:

The sititios not available:

BSD Argentina
The BSD Users Group Peru

Groups that are missing:

BSD Chile


Farewell carefully:


Carlos A. Crown C.
CdK1
BSD Chile
http://www.bsd.cl

Fix: 

Updated
